description_long: A muscular, fantasy-inspired adult male figure stands with a broad stance, adorned in rugged armor and accessories. He has a long, intricately braided beard and mohawk hairstyle, with metal rings woven into the braids. His upper body is mostly bare except for a single shoulder pauldron and leather straps, while his lower body is protected by armored boots, a wide belt, and reinforced pants. He carries a large, double-headed war hammer with a metallic and stone appearance, which is positioned beside him. The figure's attire and weaponry suggest a warrior or barbarian archetype, with detailed textures on the armor, leather, and skin.
description: A heavily built, armored adult male warrior with a braided beard, mohawk, and a large war hammer, dressed in fantasy-style armor and accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, braided beard, mohawk, chest armor, belt, and the war hammer beside him.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, beard, mohawk, arm muscles, and the side of the war hammer.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back muscles, armor details, braided ponytail, and the back of the war hammer.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the arm, shoulder armor, and the profile of the beard and mohawk.
attribute_clothing_type: fantasy warrior armor with leather straps, metal shoulder pauldron, reinforced pants, and armored boots
attribute_hairstyle: long braided mohawk with multiple beard braids
